title: Golden Grilled Russian Vialone Nano Rice Pilaf
description: A charred and springy Russian dish featuring vialone nano rice, grilled to perfection in a tandoor, and suitable for a keto-friendly diet. This energizing pilaf is perfect for a dinner meal.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the rinsed vialone nano rice, chicken broth, ghee, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Transfer the rice mixture to a heatproof bowl that fits inside the tandoor.
Grill the rice mixture in the tandoor for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
After 20 minutes, remove the bowl from the tandoor and stir in the chopped fresh parsley.
Return the bowl to the tandoor and grill for an additional 5 minutes, or until the rice is lightly charred and crispy.
Remove the pilaf from the tandoor and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the golden grilled Russian vialone nano rice pilaf hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
